subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! The world is still filled with tribulations and agitation… In short, the foundation of the Kingdom of God is based upon harmony and love, oneness, relationship and union… Formerly in Persia divorce was very easily obtained
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جهان هنوز پر موج و اضطرابست و امم عالم با یکدیگر در باطن رقیب
subcodes.subjects: @law of divorce, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
